page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A Computational Model to Predict the Causal miRNAs for Diseases.

miRNA-disease causal association predictor.

/main.py used for calculate causal miRNA-disease association potential score.

/crossvalidation.py used for 10-fold cross validation.
